name: chrome-browser-persistent
description: Persistent Chrome integration helpers for CDP and Playwright automation.

interface.shortDescription: Launch and attach to persistent Chrome sessions.
interface.longDescription: Provides standard scripts and guidance for persistent Chrome + Playwright CDP automation in Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Launch persistent Chrome with remote debugging and connect via CDP.
Attach Playwright to my existing Chrome browser and run UI checks.
Verify CDP endpoint is active and list available browser targets.
